response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with over 12 years of relevant experience, including deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. Her roles involved building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and direct collaboration with product teams. While her front-end experience leans toward Ember.js rather than React, her adaptability and focus on clean, testable code align well with the role's requirements. Her contributions to open-source projects and leadership in workshops further highlight her technical and collaborative strengths.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP)
Strong background in scalable systems, AI-agent development, and Kubernetes deployment
Proven track record in collaborative product development and mentorship
concerns: Primary front-end experience is with Ember.js rather than React, though adaptable
Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a required stack technology
Gaps in recent employment history (e.g., short tenure at re:cinq) may warrant discussion

key_factors.factor: Primary front-end stack mismatch (Ember.js vs. React)
